mapper.select: select Max(code) from test_task
SELECT Max(CODE) FROM test_task where task_code like CONCAT(#{code}, '%')
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO test_task (id, code, entrustment_id, orderer, order_time, required_completion_time, team_id, receiver, receive_time) VALUES (#{id}, #{code}, #{entrustmentId}, #{orderer}, #{orderTime}, #{requiredCompletionTime}, #{teamId}, #{receiver}, #{receiveTime})

INSERT INTO test_task (id, dept_id, code, task_code, entrustment_id, required_completion_time, state, issue_report, orderer, report_complete, order_time, task_price, present_information, create_time, inspector, recorder, reviewer, report_producer, probationer, interns, auxiliary_personnel, sampler, sample_receiving_time, pool_id, receiver, receive_time, team_id, sample_state_description ) VALUES
(#{vo.id}, #{vo.deptId}, #{vo.code}, #{vo.taskCode}, #{vo.entrustmentId}, #{vo.requiredCompletionTime}, #{vo.state}, #{vo.issueReport}, #{vo.orderer},#{vo.reportComplete},#{vo.orderTime},#{vo.taskPrice},#{vo.presentInformation}, #{vo.createTime},#{vo.inspector},#{vo.recorder},#{vo.reviewer},#{vo.reportProducer},#{vo.auxiliaryPersonnel},#{vo.probationer},#{vo.interns}, #{vo.sampler},#{vo.sampleReceivingTime},#{vo.poolId},#{vo.receiver},#{vo.receiverTime},#{vo.teamId},#{vo.outwardDescribe})
mapper.select: SELECT t1.id, IFNULL(t1.task_code, t1.code) code, t1.orderer, DATE_FORMAT(t1.order_time, '%Y-%m-%d') order_time, DATE_FORMAT(t1.required_completion_time, '%Y-%m-%d') required_completion_time, t2.count_price cost, t2.sampling_method, t2.check_purpose, t2.present_information, t2.file_url, t2.seal_type, t3.sample_id, t4.sample_name, t4.product_id, t4.sample_code, t4.specs, t4.batch_number, t4.generation, t4.sample_groups, t4.quantity_per_group, t4.sample_origin, t4.manufacturer, t4.received_date, t4.inspector, t4.sample_requirement, t4.outward, t4.picture, t5.check_item_id, t8.check_item_name, t5.method_id, t7.name, t5.standard_id, CONCAT(t6.code, '《', t6.`name`, '》') standard_name, t5.times, t5.unit_price, t5.id AS itemId, t5.state AS state, t5.origin_url AS originUrl, t5.opinion, t5.item_file_name as itemFileName FROM test_task t1 LEFT JOIN test_entrusted_info t2 ON t1.entrustment_id = t2.id LEFT JOIN test_entrusted_sample_details_rel t3 ON t2.id = t3.entrustment_id LEFT JOIN test_sample t4 ON t3.sample_id = t4.id LEFT JOIN test_entrusted_sample_checkitem_rel t5 ON t1.entrustment_id = t5.entrust_id AND t4.id = t5.sample_id LEFT JOIN test_standard_file t6 ON t5.standard_id = t6.id LEFT JOIN test_method t7 ON t5.method_id = t7.id left join test_product_item t8 on t5.check_item_id = t8.check_item_id where t1.id = #{taskId}

SELECT t1.id, t1.task_code code, t1.orderer, DATE_FORMAT(t1.order_time, '%Y-%m-%d') order_time, DATE_FORMAT(t1.required_completion_time, '%Y-%m-%d') required_completion_time, t1.task_price , t2.sampling_method, t2.check_purpose, t2.present_information, t2.file_url, t2.seal_type, IFNULL(t2.invalid_reason,null) invalid_reason, t3.sample_id, t4.sample_name, t4.alias_name, t4.product_id, t4.sample_code, t4.specs, t4.batch_number, t4.generation, t4.sample_groups, t4.quantity_per_group, t4.sample_origin, t4.manufacturer, t4.received_date, t4.inspector, t4.sample_requirement, t4.outward, t4.outward_describe, t4.picture, t4.sample_quantity, t4.alias_name, t4.sample_remark, t4.sample_type, t5.check_item_id, t5.check_item_name, t5.method_id, t7.name, t5.standard_id, CONCAT(t6.code, '《', t6.`name`, '》') standard_name, t5.times, t5.unit_price, t5.id AS itemId, t5.state AS state, t5.origin_url AS originUrl, t5.opinion, t5.start_time, t5.end_time, t5.edit_data FROM test_task t1 LEFT JOIN test_entrusted_info t2 ON t1.entrustment_id = t2.id LEFT JOIN test_entrusted_sample_details_rel t3 ON t2.id = t3.entrustment_id LEFT JOIN test_sample t4 ON t3.sample_id = t4.id LEFT JOIN test_entrusted_sample_checkitem_rel t5 ON t1.entrustment_id = t5.entrust_id LEFT JOIN test_team as t9 ON t9.id = t5.dept_id AND t4.id = t5.sample_id LEFT JOIN test_standard_file t6 ON t5.standard_id = t6.id LEFT JOIN test_method t7 ON t5.method_id = t7.id left join test_product_item t8 on t5.check_item_id = t8.check_item_id where t1.id = #{taskId} and t5.task_id = #{taskId} and t9.id in (t1.dept_id )

SELECT t2.id, t2.NAME, t2.CODE, t2.model, t3.temperature, t3.humidity, t3.start_time, t3.end_time, t3.USER FROM test_product_item_instrument_middle_rel AS t1 LEFT JOIN test_instrument t2 ON t1.intrusment_id = t2.id LEFT JOIN test_instrument_use_record t3 ON t1.id_item = t3.esc_rel_id AND t1.intrusment_id = t3.instrument_id WHERE t1.id_item = #{idItem} ORDER BY t1.id desc

SELECT t1.id taskId, IFNULL(t1.task_code, t1.CODE) taskCode, DATE_FORMAT(t1.required_completion_time,'%Y-%m-%d') requiredTime, DATE_FORMAT(t1.receive_time,'%Y-%m-%d') receiveTime, t4.sample_name sampleName, t4.id sampleId, t4.sample_code sampeCode, t4.batch_number batchNumber, t4.picture, t4.alias_name aliasName, t4.sample_type sampleType FROM test_task t1 LEFT JOIN test_entrusted_info t2 ON t1.entrustment_id = t2.id LEFT JOIN test_entrusted_sample_details_rel t3 ON t2.id = t3.entrustment_id LEFT JOIN test_sample t4 ON t3.sample_id = t4.id WHERE t1.state = 1
and t1.task_code LIKE CONCAT('%',#{taskCode},'%')
and t4.sample_name LIKE CONCAT('%',#{sampleName},'%')
and str_to_date( t1.receive_time, '%Y-%m-%d' ) >= str_to_date( #{beginDate}, '%Y-%m-%d' )
and str_to_date( t1.receive_time, '%Y-%m-%d' ) <= str_to_date( #{endDate}, '%Y-%m-%d' )
and t1.dept_id in
#{item}
order by t1.code desc

SELECT DISTINCT t1.id taskId, IFNULL( t1.task_code, t1.CODE ) taskCode, DATE_FORMAT(t1.required_completion_time,'%Y-%m-%d') requiredCompletionTime, t1.inspector, t2.count_price cost, t4.sample_name sampleName, t4.product_id, t1.state, t1.recorder, t1.reviewer, t1.report_producer reportProducer FROM test_task t1 LEFT JOIN test_entrusted_info t2 ON t1.entrustment_id = t2.id LEFT JOIN test_entrusted_sample_details_rel t3 ON t2.id = t3.entrustment_id LEFT JOIN test_sample t4 ON t3.sample_id = t4.id LEFT JOIN test_team t5 ON t1.team_id = t5.id
and t1.task_code LIKE CONCAT('%',#{taskCode},'%')
and t4.sample_name LIKE CONCAT('%',#{sampleName},'%')
and t1.state=#{state}
ORDER BY t1.required_completion_time asc, t2.entrustment_no asc

SELECT DISTINCT t1.id taskId, t1.task_code taskCode, DATE_FORMAT(t1.required_completion_time,'%Y-%m-%d') requiredCompletionTime, t1.inspector, t2.count_price cost, t4.sample_name sampleName, t4.product_id, t1.state, t1.recorder, t1.reviewer, t1.report_producer reportProducer, t1.issue_report issueReport FROM test_task t1 LEFT JOIN test_entrusted_info t2 ON t1.entrustment_id = t2.id LEFT JOIN test_entrusted_sample_details_rel t3 ON t2.id = t3.entrustment_id LEFT JOIN test_sample t4 ON t3.sample_id = t4.id LEFT JOIN test_team t5 ON t1.team_id = t5.id
and t1.dept_id in
#{id}
and t1.task_code LIKE CONCAT('%',#{taskCode},'%')
and t4.sample_name LIKE CONCAT('%',#{sampleName},'%')
and t1.state=#{state}
GROUP BY t1.id ORDER BY t1.code desc

SELECT DISTINCT t1.id taskId, t1.entrustment_id, t1.task_code taskCode, t1.code, t1.orderer, DATE_FORMAT(t1.required_completion_time,'%Y-%m-%d') requiredCompletionTime, t1.inspector, t2.count_price cost, t4.sample_name sampleName, t4.product_id, t4.id sampleId, t4.sample_code sampeCode, t4.batch_number batchNumber, t4.picture, t4.alias_name aliasName, t4.sample_type sampleType, t4.outward_describe outwardDescribe, IF(t2.state = 144,144, t1.state) as state, t1.recorder, t1.reviewer, t1.report_producer reportProducer, t1.issue_report issueReport, t1.sampler, t1.sample_receiving_time, t1.sample_state_description, t1.task_price, t1.create_time, t1.probationer, t1.interns, t1.auxiliary_personnel FROM test_task t1 LEFT JOIN test_entrusted_info t2 ON t1.entrustment_id = t2.id LEFT JOIN test_entrusted_sample_details_rel t3 ON t2.id = t3.entrustment_id LEFT JOIN test_sample t4 ON t3.sample_id = t4.id LEFT JOIN test_team t5 ON t1.team_id = t5.id
and t1.dept_id in
#{id}
and t1.task_code LIKE CONCAT('%',#{taskCode},'%')
and t4.sample_name LIKE CONCAT('%',#{sampleName},'%')
and t1.state=#{state}
and (t1.state=1 or t1.state=3 or t1.state=4 or t1.state=6 or t1.state=144 )
and ( t1.inspector LIKE CONCAT('%',#{inspector},'%') or t1.reviewer LIKE CONCAT('%',#{reviewer},'%') OR t1.recorder like CONCAT( '%',#{recorder}, '%' ) OR t1.report_producer like CONCAT( '%',#{reportProducer}, '%' ) OR t1.sampler like CONCAT( '%',#{sampler}, '%' ) OR t1.probationer like CONCAT( '%',#{probationer}, '%' ) OR t1.interns like CONCAT( '%',#{interns}, '%' ) OR t1.auxiliary_personnel like CONCAT( '%',#{auxiliaryPersonnel}, '%' ) )
ORDER BY t1.create_time desc, t1.code desc

SELECT DISTINCT t1.id taskId, t1.entrustment_id, t1.task_code taskCode, t1.code, t1.orderer, DATE_FORMAT(t1.required_completion_time,'%Y-%m-%d') requiredCompletionTime, t1.inspector, t1.task_price, t4.sample_name sampleName, t4.product_id, t4.id sampleId, t4.sample_code sampeCode, t4.batch_number batchNumber, t4.picture, t4.alias_name aliasName, t4.sample_type sampleType, t4.outward_describe outwardDescribe, IF(t2.state = 144,144, t1.state) as state, t1.recorder, t1.reviewer, t1.report_producer reportProducer, t1.issue_report issueReport, t1.sampler, t1.sample_receiving_time, t1.sample_state_description, t1.create_time, t1.probationer, t1.interns, t1.auxiliary_personnel FROM test_task t1 LEFT JOIN test_entrusted_info t2 ON t1.entrustment_id = t2.id LEFT JOIN test_entrusted_sample_details_rel t3 ON t2.id = t3.entrustment_id LEFT JOIN test_sample t4 ON t3.sample_id = t4.id LEFT JOIN test_team t5 ON t1.team_id = t5.id
and t1.dept_id in
#{id}
and t1.task_code LIKE CONCAT('%',#{taskCode},'%')
and t4.sample_name LIKE CONCAT('%',#{sampleName},'%')
and t1.state >= #{state} and t1.state !=2
and (t1.state >= 1 or t1.state !=2 or t1.state = 0 )
ORDER BY t1.create_time desc, t1.code desc
SELECT task_code FROM test_task WHERE entrustment_id = ( SELECT entrustment_id FROM test_task WHERE id = #{taskId} ) AND id != #{taskId} and state != 144
mapper.update:
UPDATE test_task
state=#{state}, task_code=#{taskCode}, team_id=#{teamId}, inspector=#{inspector}, recorder=#{recorder}, reviewer=#{reviewer}, review_time=#{reviewTime},
report_producer=#{reportProducer}, receiver=#{receiver}, receive_time=#{receiveTime}, start_detection_time=#{startDetectionTime}, end_detection_time=#{endDetectionTime}, verifyer=#{verifyer}, signer=#{signer}, sample_receiving_time=#{sampleReceivingTime}, sample_state_description=#{sampleStateDescription}, sampler=#{sampler}, required_completion_time=#{requiredCompletionTime}, order_time=#{orderTime}, task_price=#{taskPrice}, probationer=#{probationer}, interns=#{interns}, auxiliary_personnel=#{auxiliaryPersonnel},
where id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, code, start_detection_time, end_detection_time, state, inspector, reviewer, recorder FROM test_task WHERE id = #{taskId}
SELECT t1.id AS id, t1.code AS code FROM test_team AS t1 LEFT JOIN test_technicist AS t2 ON t1.id = t2.team_id WHERE t2.user_id = #{userid} LIMIT 1

SELECT t1.id as id, t1.name as name, t3.name as sname, t3.id as sId FROM test_team AS t1 LEFT JOIN test_team as t3 ON t1.id = t3.pid LEFT JOIN test_technicist AS t2 ON t1.id = t2.team_id WHERE t2.user_id = #{userid} and t2.del_flag = 0

SELECT t3.user_id value, t3.NAME label FROM sys_role AS t1 LEFT JOIN sys_user_role AS t2 ON t1.role_id = t2.role_id LEFT JOIN sys_user AS t3 ON t3.user_id = t2.user_id WHERE t1.role_id = #{roleId} AND t3.NAME IS NOT NULL GROUP BY t3.user_id

SELECT t4.name AS label, t4.name AS value FROM test_team AS t1 LEFT JOIN test_technicist AS t2 ON t1.id = t2.team_id LEFT JOIN sys_user AS t3 ON t3.user_id = t2.user_id LEFT JOIN sys_ding_user AS t4 ON t3.ding_user_id = t4.userid WHERE 1=1 and t1.id = #{id} and t4.name is not NULL
SELECT t1.task_code, t2.id, t2.project_name, t2.project_part, t2.state, t2.acceptance_date FROM test_task t1 LEFT JOIN test_entrusted_info t2 ON t1.entrustment_id = t2.id where t1.id = #{taskId}

SELECT t2.`code` FROM (SELECT * FROM test_entrusted_sample_checkitem_rel WHERE check_item_id = #{checkItemId} AND entrust_id = #{entrustId} AND sample_id = #{sampleId}) t1 LEFT JOIN test_standard_file t2 ON t1.standard_id = t2.id

SELECT -- CONCAT(t2.CODE, "《", t2.`name`, "》") t2.CODE FROM (SELECT standard_id FROM test_entrusted_sample_standard_rel WHERE sample_id = #{sampleId} AND entrustment_id = #{entrustId}) t1 LEFT JOIN test_standard_file t2 ON t1.standard_id = t2.id
SELECT file_url FROM test_original_record_template WHERE check_item_id = #{checkItemId} order by id desc limit 1

update.foreach:
update test_entrusted_sample_checkitem_rel
origin_url = #{item.originUrl},
file_url_str = #{item.fileUrlStr},
item_file_name = #{item.itemFileName},
where id = #{item.itemId}

mapper.select: SELECT start_time, end_time, result, origin_url FROM test_entrusted_sample_checkitem_rel WHERE id = #{itemId}
SELECT inspector, recorder, reviewer, report_producer reportProducer FROM test_task WHERE id = #{taskId}
select report_complete from test_task where entrustment_id = #{entrustmentId} and id != #{taskId} and state != 144
SELECT id, pid, sample_code sampleCode, batch_number batchNumber, state, alias_name aliasName, sample_type sampleType FROM test_sample WHERE pid = #{sampleId}

SELECT t1.id as taskId, t1.sampler as sampler, t1.sample_receiving_time as sampleReceivingTime, t1.orderer as recorder, t1.sample_state_description as sampleStateDescription, t2.is_save as issueReport FROM test_task as t1 LEFT JOIN test_entrusted_info as t2 ON t1.entrustment_id = t2.id WHERE t1.id = #{id}

update.foreach:
update test_entrusted_sample_checkitem_rel
state = #{item.state},
opinion = #{item.remark},
where id = #{item.itemId}

mapper.select:
SELECT t1.id as idItem, t1.check_item_id as checkItemId, t1.task_id as taskId, t1.sample_id as sampleId, t1.state, t1.entrust_id as entrustmentId, t2.file_url as fileUrl, t1.check_item_name as checkItemName, t3.task_code as taskCode, t2.name as originalName FROM test_entrusted_sample_checkitem_rel as t1 LEFT JOIN test_original_record_template as t2 ON t1.check_item_id = t2.check_item_id LEFT JOIN test_task as t3 ON t3.id = t1.task_id WHERE 1=1
and t1.id IN
#{id}
and t2.file_url is not NULL and t2.del_flag = 0

SELECT id as taskId, task_code, state, order_time, receive_time, start_detection_time, end_detection_time, review_time, dept_id, task_price, sampler, sample_state_description, code FROM test_task WHERE entrustment_id = #{entrustmentId}

SELECT t3.outward_describe FROM test_task t1 LEFT JOIN test_entrusted_sample_details_rel t2 ON t1.entrustment_id = t2.entrustment_id LEFT JOIN test_sample t3 ON t2.sample_id = t3.id WHERE t1.id = #{taskId}
select entrustment_id from test_task where id = #{taskId}
select entrustment_id,task_code from test_task where id = #{taskId}

SELECT id as task_id, task_code FROM test_task WHERE entrustment_id IN
#{item}

SELECT t1.id, t1.task_code code, t1.orderer, DATE_FORMAT(t1.order_time, '%Y-%m-%d') order_time, DATE_FORMAT(t1.required_completion_time, '%Y-%m-%d') required_completion_time, t1.task_price , t2.sampling_method, t2.check_purpose, t2.present_information, t2.file_url, t2.seal_type, IFNULL(t2.invalid_reason,null) invalid_reason, t3.sample_id, t4.sample_name, t4.alias_name, t4.product_id, t4.sample_code, t4.specs, t4.batch_number, t4.generation, t4.sample_groups, t4.quantity_per_group, t4.sample_origin, t4.manufacturer, t4.received_date, t4.inspector, t4.sample_requirement, t4.outward, t4.picture, t4.sample_quantity, t4.alias_name, t4.sample_remark, t4.sample_type FROM test_task t1 LEFT JOIN test_entrusted_info t2 ON t1.entrustment_id = t2.id LEFT JOIN test_entrusted_sample_details_rel t3 ON t2.id = t3.entrustment_id LEFT JOIN test_sample t4 ON t3.sample_id = t4.id where t1.id = #{taskId}

SELECT t1.id AS taskId, t1.order_time, t1.task_code as taskCode, t3.id sampleId, t3.sample_code sampeCode, t3.alias_name aliasName FROM `test_task` AS t1 LEFT JOIN test_entrusted_sample_details_rel AS t2 ON t1.entrustment_id = t2.entrustment_id LEFT JOIN test_sample t3 ON t2.sample_id = t3.id WHERE t1.inspector LIKE CONCAT('%',#{userId},'%') AND t1.receive_time IS NOT NULL and t1.state < 4
AND (t1.task_code like CONCAT('%',#{search},'%') or t3.sample_code like CONCAT('%',#{search},'%') or t3.alias_name like CONCAT('%',#{search},'%') )
ORDER BY t1.create_time desc

SELECT t2.id AS taskId, t1.start_time as startTime, t2.order_time, t2.task_code AS taskCode, t4.id sampleId, t4.sample_code sampeCode, t4.alias_name aliasName, t1.id as record_id, t1.esc_rel_id as escRelId, t5.check_item_name FROM test_instrument_use_record AS t1 LEFT JOIN test_task t2 ON t1.task_id = t2.id LEFT JOIN test_entrusted_sample_details_rel AS t3 ON t2.entrustment_id = t3.entrustment_id LEFT JOIN test_sample t4 ON t3.sample_id = t4.id LEFT JOIN test_entrusted_sample_checkitem_rel as t5 ON t5.id = t1.esc_rel_id WHERE t1.instrument_id = #{instrumentId} AND t1.end_time IS NULL and t2.id is not null
AND (t2.task_code like CONCAT('%',#{search},'%') or t4.sample_code like CONCAT('%',#{search},'%') or t4.alias_name like CONCAT('%',#{search},'%') )

SELECT t1.id as idItem, t1.check_item_id as checkItemId, t1.task_id as taskId, t1.sample_id as sampleId, t1.state, t1.entrust_id as entrustmentId, t1.check_item_name as checkItemName FROM test_entrusted_sample_checkitem_rel as t1 WHERE task_id = #{taskId} ORDER BY check_item_id

SELECT id, CODE, entrustment_id, orderer, order_time, required_completion_time, team_id, receiver, receive_time, sampler, sample_receiving_time, inspector, start_detection_time, end_detection_time, recorder, reviewer, verifyer, verify_time, signer, sign_time, state, report_producer, task_code, reason, report_url, 1 as issue_report, dept_id, report_complete, sample_state_description, review_time, task_price, present_information, create_time, auxiliary_personnel FROM test_task WHERE id = #{taskId}
mapper.update: update test_entrusted_sample_checkitem_rel set dept_id = null, task_id = null WHERE entrust_id = #{entrustmentId}
mapper.select:
SELECT t3.NAME AS label, t3.user_id AS VALUE, t1.NAME as text FROM test_team as t1 LEFT JOIN test_technicist as t2 ON t1.id = t2.team_id LEFT JOIN sys_user as t3 ON t3.user_id = t2.user_id WHERE
t3.user_id in
#{id}
and t3.name is not NULL and t2.del_flag = 0
SELECT id, NAME, type, remark FROM test_init_data where type = #{TypeId} ORDER BY id asc
